description: Composition Purple t-shirt made of 100% pique cotton, with short mildly puff sleeves with ribbed hems, tipped and ribbed collar with buttoned chest placket and branding in stone embellishments on left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Perfect on style and great in comfort, this stylish t-shirt from wrangler makes for a great casual wear. The short puffed sleeves create a feel of casual comfort and enhance your feminine side, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and sandals and ooze style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33"
